# Theme Reduction Audit

The bloated repository of ~120 themes has been successfully reduced to the 6 strongest candidates.

- Luxury: KEEP Luxury01.tsx (Royal Palace)
- Floral: KEEP Floral01.tsx
- Minimalist: KEEP Minimal01.tsx
- Islamic: KEEP Islamic01.tsx
- Dark: KEEP Dark01.tsx
- Cinematic: KEEP CinematicTheme.tsx

All others are ALREADY REMOVED.
